steps.title: Use the scale factor
steps.content:
The model is proportional to $x^2$. The new circumference is $6$ times the old circumference:
$$
\frac{4.50}{0.75}=6
$$

steps.title: Square the factor
steps.content:
Since circumference is multiplied by $6$, strength is multiplied by $6^2$:
$$
6^2=36
$$

steps.title: Find the new strength
steps.content: Multiply the given breaking strength by $36$: $$ 697.5(36)=25{,}110 $$ The answer is 25110.
